CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([4, 5, 6])), (3, bitmapBuild([7, 8, 9]));
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmap_col) FROM test_bitmap GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])) FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_subqueries (group_id UInt32, ids AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_subqueries VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (1, bitmapBuild([4, 5])), (2, bitmapBuild([6, 7]));
SELECT group_id, bitmapToArray(bitmapMerge(ids)) AS combined_ids FROM test_subqueries GROUP BY group_id;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])) FROM test_bitmap WHERE id IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_bitmap WHERE id > 1);
CREATE TABLE test_join (a UInt32, b AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2])), (1, bitmapBuild([3, 4])), (2, bitmapBuild([5]));
SELECT a, bitmapToArray(bitmapMerge(b)) AS merged_bitmap FROM test_join GROUP BY a;
